name: Striped Coiled Rope Kids' Storage Bin - Pillowfort™
description: Keep your little one's room neat and clutter free with the Striped Coiled Rope Storage Bin from Pillowfort™. Featuring a circular silhouette with an open-top design for easy accessibility, this nursery storage bin is great for storing anything from books and craft supplies to small toys and more. Plus, it's designed with two side handles for easy portability. Made from coiled rope, it features a striped design in red, orange, pink, blue and white to bring a striking color update to their room.
